channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Lesson 8: “My mind is preoccupied with past thoughts.”
item.description: “My mind is preoccupied with past thoughts.” This idea is, of course, the reason why you see only the past. No-one really sees anything. He sees only his thoughts projected outward.The mind’s preoccupation with the past is the cause of the total misconception about time from which your seeing suffer
